title: Profile
text: Profile Determines the prefix character used when displaying profile characters in widgets (but not Unifields). Profile = ANSICharacterCode Arguments Table 1. Default PROFILE settings Character set Hex Decimal Simplified Chinese 0xA1A4 41380 Traditional Chinese 0xA150 41296 Korean 0xA1A4 41380 Japanese A5 165 Other B7 183 Default value Language dependent File section [upi] Was this topic helpful?
